generatedArtifacts.tailoredResumeSummary: Uploaded resume jay_kumar_gupta_nit_kkr.pdf was used as the primary context. Focused JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js to match the Software Engineer Contractor role at Blue Umbrella India Pvt Ltd.
generatedArtifacts.coverLetterExcerpt: I am excited to apply for the Software Engineer Contractor role at Blue Umbrella India Pvt Ltd, where I can bring my JavaScript, React, Next.js experience as an aspiring Software Engineer.

shortAnswers.question: Why are you interested in this role?
shortAnswers.answer: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a Software Engineer and uses skills I have already practiced through projects and coursework.

shortAnswers.question: What makes you a match?
shortAnswers.answer: My background in JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js closely matches the technical expectations in the job description.
